text:
>Number:         1807
>Category:       ports
>Synopsis:       Port of SWI Prolog 2.5.6

There has been newer version of SWI prolog (2.7.14).  It's avialbe
from ftp://swi.psy.uva.nl/pub/SWI-Prolog/.  I suppose it would be
better if you could make a port of the newer version instead.
